VALUES ('d6ef20e3-0a43-4b85-974a-25b0afc71c61', 'Which choice completes the sentence so that it follows Standard English conventions?

After the lecture ended the students asked follow up questions ______ continued.', NULL, NULL, '[{"id":"A","text":"ended, the","is_correct":true,"explanation":"Introductory dependent clause needs a comma before the main clause."},{"id":"B","text":"ended the","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Incorrect boundary: \"ended the\" does not fix the sentence."},{"id":"C","text":"ended; the","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Incorrect boundary: \"ended; the\" does not fix the sentence."},{"id":"D","text":"ended: the","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Incorrect boundary: \"ended: the\" does not fix the sentence."}]'::jsonb, 'A', 'Introductory dependent clause needs a comma before the main clause.', NULL, 'Standard English Conventions', 'Boundaries', 'reading_writing', 'conventions', 'BOU', NULL, 'hard', false, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_bulk_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())
ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

The data from the experiments suggest a trend ______ conclusive.', NULL, NULL, '[{"id":"A","text":"suggest","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Subject-verb agreement error."},{"id":"B","text":"suggests","is_correct":true,"explanation":"Correct verb form: \"suggests\"."},{"id":"C","text":"suggesting","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Agreement error."},{"id":"D","text":"have suggested","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Wrong tense or agreement."}]'::jsonb, 'B', 'The subject requires the verb "suggests" for agreement.', NULL, 'Standard English Conventions', 'Form, Structure, and Sense', 'reading_writing', 'conventions', 'FSS', NULL, 'easy', false, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_bulk_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())

VALUES ('a3dcbf09-9774-4641-b61f-f0a3eee27f2c', 'Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to Standard English conventions?
